LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING - A R G U E D; PLAINTIFFS ANDY'S BP, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION & SELF-SERVE PETROLEUM, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED IN ITS ENTIRETY. CROSS-DEFENDANTS SHIFTED THE BURDEN BY PRESENTING EVIDENCE THAT CROSS-COMPLAINANTS RECEIVED ALL WAGES, OVERTIME AND OTHER COMPENSATION TO WHICH THEY WERE ENTITLED AS WELL AS ALL REST AND MEAL PERIOD BREAKS. HOWEVER, CROSS-COMPLAINANTS RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT REGARDING WHETHER CROSS-COMPLAINANTS ACTUALLY RECEIVED ALL WAGES, OVERTIME AND OTHER COMPENSATION AS WELL AS MEAL AND REST PERIOD BREAKS TO WHICH THEY WERE ENTITLED. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP 437 C(G) AND CRC 3.1312). JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jun-28-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JAMES M. DOMBROSKI, TEL. NO. (707) 762-7807 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
ATTY. ASHWIN V. LADVA OF THE LADVA LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 296-8844 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - A R G U E D; PLAINTIFFS ANDY'S BP, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION & SELF-SERVE PETROLEUM, INC., A CALIFORNIA corporation's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED IN ITS ENTIRETY. CROSS-DEFENDANTS SHIFTED THE BURDEN BY PRESENTING EVIDENCE THAT CROSS-COMPLAINANTS RECEIVED ALL WAGES, OVERTIME AND OTHER COMPENSATION TO WHICH THEY WERE ENTITLED AS WELL AS ALL REST AND MEAL PERIOD BREAKS. HOWEVER, CROSS-COMPLAINANTS RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT REGARDING WHETHER CROSS-COMPLAINANTS ACTUALLY RECEIVED ALL WAGES, OVERTIME AND OTHER COMPENSATION AS WELL AS MEAL AND REST PERIOD BREAKS TO WHICH THEY WERE ENTITLED. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order pursuant to CCP 437 C(g) AND CRC 3.1312). Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 = (302/MJM)
